payload.answer: The new information supersedes the prior current-employment fact. Record Goldman as former employment and Point72 as current employment; do not keep 'Sam works at Goldman' as current.

entity_resolution.reason: The new fact refers to the same person, Sam, and introduces a time-ordered employment change rather than a different entity.

details: Detected a direct conflict with an existing current fact.
Resolved the conflict as a temporal employment transition.
Preserved the prior employer only as historical, not current.

repair_options: Mark the existing fact 'Sam works at Goldman' as no longer current.
Store 'Sam left Goldman' as a past transition event.
Store 'Sam works at Point72' as the new current employment.
If the system supports timestamps, attach transition timing when available.
